stemHtml: In October, one location is at latitude N65° (Area A) and another at S65° (Area B). Considering the Earth's axial tilt and its position in its orbit around the sun during this month, which statement best describes the relative temperatures of Area A and Area B?

options.a: Area A and Area B have the same temperature.
options.b: Area A is warmer than Area B.
options.c: Area B is colder than Area A.
options.d: Area B is warmer than Area A.
